languages.text: "То есть ты бросил друга в агонии на пятьдесят лет и до сих пор не вернулся? Так себе из тебя товарищ".
"You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."
languages.original_text: "То есть ты бросил друга в агонии на пятьдесят лет и до сих пор не вернулся? Так себе из тебя товарищ".

traits.locale_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."
"You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."
"You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

languages.text: «¿Abandonó a un hombre para que sufriera durante cincuenta años y no ha vuelto a su lado? Menuda amistad la suya».
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

traits.locale_text: «¿Abandonó a un hombre para que sufriera durante cincuenta años y no ha vuelto a su lado? Menuda amistad la suya».

languages.text: “你的意思是，你让一个人独自煎熬了五十年，至今都没回去找过他？你可太够朋友了。”
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

traits.locale_text: “你的意思是，你让一个人独自煎熬了五十年，至今都没回去找过他？你可太够朋友了。”

languages.text: « Vous voulez dire que vous avez laissé un homme souffrir le martyre pendant cinquante ans, sans jamais retourner le voir ? Vous parlez d'un ami... »
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

traits.locale_text: « Vous voulez dire que vous avez laissé un homme souffrir le martyre pendant cinquante ans, sans jamais retourner le voir ? Vous parlez d'un ami... »

languages.text: "Bana bir adamı elli yıl boyunca can çekişmeye bıraktığını ve hâlâ geri dönmediğini mi söylüyorsun? Ne iyi arkadaşmışsın."
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

traits.locale_text: "Bana bir adamı elli yıl boyunca can çekişmeye bıraktığını ve hâlâ geri dönmediğini mi söylüyorsun? Ne iyi arkadaşmışsın."

languages.text: "Ihr wollt mir erzählen, dass Ihr einen Mann vor fünfzig Jahren zurückgelassen habt und bis heute nicht zu ihm zurückgekehrt seid? Ihr seid mir ja ein schöner Freund."
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wollt mir erzählen, dass Ihr einen Mann vor fünfzig Jahren zurückgelassen habt und bis heute nicht zu ihm zurückgekehrt seid? Ihr seid mir ja ein schöner Freund."

languages.text: "苦悩する男を50年も放っておいて、いまだに彼のもとに戻らないというのか？あなたは立派な友人だ"
languages.original_text: "You mean to tell me that you left a man in agony for fifty years and still haven't gone back to him? A fine friend you are."
